title: Catch Semantics, Collection Identity, Randomness, and Deterministic Evidence · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Owned Copy
summary: Catch uses a hidden global random source, stores partial response pointers, duplicates the same Pokemon unpredictably, and makes tests depend on luck and request timing. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source.
